title: briza major
intro: Briza major, also known as quaking grass or purple quaking grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Briza major include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Briza major can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or used in the form of essential oil and tincture, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
